refs.purpose: Normalize fetched IWC workflows into a consistent representation for structural comparison.
refs.trigger: After fetching a candidate IWC workflow file and before structural comparison.

refs.purpose: Compare proposed collection transformations against curated corpus-observed pattern guidance.
refs.trigger: When the data-flow brief proposes collection reshape, cleanup, relabel, synchronization, or collection-tabular bridge sections.

refs.purpose: Compare proposed tabular transformations against curated corpus-observed pattern guidance.
refs.trigger: When the data-flow brief proposes tabular filtering, projection, join, aggregation, SQL, or free-form text-processing sections.

refs.purpose: Compare against the design briefs' abstract intent without turning exemplar comparison into tool resolution.
refs.trigger: When deciding whether to compare abstract data-flow shape, interface structure, or speculative implementation details.
refs.verification: Promote after exemplar comparison flags structural issues without resolving concrete tool metadata.

refs.purpose: Flag proposed shortcuts that are accepted in IWC versus shortcuts that should be treated as smells.
refs.trigger: When the design briefs propose tests, assertions, labels, or expected-output comparisons.

refs.purpose: Compare proposed test-data placement and fixture shapes against IWC conventions.
refs.trigger: When the design briefs hint at workflow tests or input fixture organization.

produces.description: Structural diff against the nearest IWC exemplar(s); guidance for the downstream *-summary-to-galaxy-template Mold before per-step authoring.

consumes.description: Galaxy interface brief from [[nextflow-summary-to-galaxy-interface]] when running the NEXTFLOW → GALAXY pipeline.
Galaxy data-flow brief from [[nextflow-summary-to-galaxy-data-flow]] when running the NEXTFLOW → GALAXY pipeline.
Galaxy interface brief from [[cwl-summary-to-galaxy-interface]] when running the CWL → GALAXY pipeline.
Galaxy data-flow brief from [[cwl-summary-to-galaxy-data-flow]] when running the CWL → GALAXY pipeline.
Galaxy interface brief from [[freeform-summary-to-galaxy-interface]] when running the PAPER → GALAXY or INTERVIEW → GALAXY pipelines.
Galaxy data-flow brief from [[freeform-summary-to-galaxy-data-flow]] when running the PAPER → GALAXY or INTERVIEW → GALAXY pipelines.
